profile_summary: Family traveler (mid budget) prioritizing family-friendly, cleanliness.

recommendations.justification: The Park Aurora, Mexico City ranks #1 for this traveler on family-friendly (+0.71), cleanliness (+0.85), weighted by what matters most to them. Guests note: "The kids loved the pool and the staff were wonderful with our toddler."

supporting_evidence.quote: The kids loved the pool and the staff were wonderful with our toddler.
Housekeeping was impeccable; the room was fresh every single day.
Fantastic for families — connecting rooms, a kids' club, and high chairs at breakfast.
